summary: Tested Recruitment Approval Gate and Applicant/Employee Separation features. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Recruitment Pipeline shows applicants with Approve buttons, Staff page shows only employees, person_stage badge displays correctly on profiles.

issues: Existing applicants created before this feature don't have applicant_reference - shows 'Not assigned' which is expected backward compatibility behavior

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test applicants during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recruitment approval gate and applicant/employee separation features are fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/employees/{id}/approve-recruitment, GET /api/recruitment/pipeline, GET /api/recruitment/applicants, GET /api/staff/employees. Employee code is only assigned on recruitment approval. Person stage is derived from status at runtime.

recruitment_approval_gate.details: Correctly transitions applicant to employee stage, assigns employee_code, sets all approval fields

employee_code_timing.details: New applicants get applicant_reference (APP-XXXXXXXX), employee_code is null until approval

pipeline_endpoint.details: Returns only applicant-stage people with 4 stages (new, screening, interview, compliance_review)

staff_endpoint.details: Returns only employee-stage people (onboarding, active, inactive)

person_stage_derivation.details: person_stage correctly derived from status - 'applicant' for new/screening/interview/compliance_review, 'employee' for onboarding/active/inactive

status_transition_on_approval.details: Status correctly changes to 'onboarding' on recruitment approval

frontend_staff_page.details: Shows 'Staff' header, displays only employees with employee codes, has 'Recruitment Pipeline' button

frontend_recruitment_pipeline.details: Shows pipeline stages, applicants list with Approve buttons, approval dialog works correctly

frontend_person_stage_badge.details: Employee profile shows 'Applicant' badge for applicant-stage people
